author: audit-agent

patch.value: Current behavior: only parent|type allowed. Expected: priority, status, assignee, tags, sprint, release should also be valid group-by fields. This limits the analytical capabilities for agents trying to triage and report on project state.
Expand aggregate group-by to support priority, status, assignee, tags

The aggregate command currently only supports group-by parent|type. Attempting --group-by priority returns error: 'Aggregate group fields must be one of parent|type'. For a universal PM tool, grouping by priority, status, assignee, sprint, release, and tags would be essential.
Aggregate supports grouping by priority, status, assignee, tags at minimum

message: Audit finding: aggregate group-by too limited for universal PM
